calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-19-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-29-2013 Continued To Nov-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator. Sean Carberry for Manuela Ciuca (Beneficiary). Giulio Accornero for Nicolae Nicoara, Adrian Cardas and Sorin Iorganda.

The Court stated that when dealing with heir finders, it needs to know whether the Parties have an understanding of their interest in the Estate and that notice needs to be provided to Mr. Cardas. Mr. Carberry stated that his Client filed a 13100 Declaration, that his Client is concerned that the check will be made out to her Mother's estate, that the check should be made out to Manuela Alexandra Ciuca and that his Client will have difficulty negotiating the check if it is made out to the Mother's estate. The accounting petition was continued to November 19, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice to Mr. Cardas. The Court will look into the issue raised by Mr. Carberry with regard to the named payee on the check.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Clark. (Not Reported)

Petition To Determine Those Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Administrator. Giulio Accornero for Nicolae Nicoara (Petitioner).

Mr. Accornero presented an endorsed copy of a declaration he filed this morning. Counsel addressed the issue of efforts made/not made with regard to identifying the Maternal Heirs. The Petition to Determine Those Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petition To Determine Those Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-31-2012 Continued To Aug-28-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Giulio Accornero for Nicolae Nicoara (Petitioner).

The Court noted that Mr. Ferdon was not present. The Petition to Determine Those Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate was continued to August 28, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Accornero to obtain something in writing from his Clients showing that he can receive notice on their behalf, to have Sorin Iorganda join in the petition with a verification signed by Counsel or to file a proof of service with his Clients addresses. The Court would like Mr. Ferdon present to follow up with regard to the Maternal Heirs.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

Petition To Determine Those Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-10-2012 Continued To Jul-31-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that Mr. Carberry was aware of the Public Adminisrtator having priority and that the bank accounts were being looked into. The Court stated that the procedural defect with regard to notice had been cured. The Court will appoint the Public Administrator as the Administrator for the Estate of Octavain Cardas (subject to a written order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-29-2009 Continued To Jan-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

This matter was continued to January 26, 2010 by the Probate Examiner. The Court informed Mr. Ferdon that it did not have the chance to review the file. Mr. Ferdon stated that Mr. Carberry did not appear as he understood that the Public Administrator had priority, and that in order to serve you had to be a U.S. resident and if not, you could not serve or nominate someone else to serve. In addition, he stated that he was not receiving the Examiner's notes, that Mr. Carberry had the opportunity to see if the Romanian Executor could execute authority and that the Court could appoint the Public Administrator on Mr. Carberry's petition or its own motion. The Court requested Mr. Ferdon obtain acknowledgment in writing from Mr. Carberry. The matter was continued to January 26, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
